events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the confined space field condition matches the controlling reference document (tags, ratings, layout, and revision all current), so this document-conformance check **passes** with **low risk**. Noted a follow-up action to confirm the full 1910.146 permit-space program (atmospheric testing, attendant, rescue plan) is separately documented, since this check only verifies drawing-to-field agreement, not the entire entry program.
